RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
DEPARTMENT OF REGULATION
CENTRAL OFFICE, MUMBAI

Ref.No.DOR.SEC.REC.14/21.05.021/2026-27
June 10, 2026

All Scheduled Commercial Banks

Master Circular - Physical Security and Surveillance

1. Context
To ensure the safety of bank assets and customers, it is imperative to maintain functional physical security systems across all branches.

2. CCTV Surveillance Systems
All branches must ensure that CCTV cameras are operational 24/7.
- Log updates must be verified weekly to ensure recording integrity.
- Branch managers must verify that cameras cover all entry/exit points, cash counters, and strong rooms.
- A physical inspection report or screenshot of the CCTV feed status must be uploaded as proof of operational status.

3. Deadline
This directive is effective immediately. All branches must comply within 15 days of this circular's issuance.

Yours faithfully,
(Ravi Shankar)
Chief General Manager
